headline: How The Baker Hughes (BKR) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Assumptions
summary: The updated analyst work on Baker Hughes has lifted the modelled fair value from US$61.33 to US$62.67, a small change that still matters if you are tracking where targets are settling. This shift lines up with recent research that has been focused on recalibrating valuation rather than rewriting the story, as firms adjust their assumptions around earnings power and the multiples they are comfortable using. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these target moves and keep up with the...

headline: How The Nel (OB:NEL) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Trim Targets And Valuation
summary: Nel’s latest research update trims one modelled fair value estimate from NOK 2.18 to NOK 2.14, while headline price targets now tend to cluster closer to NOK 2.40 and below. Analysts are weighing execution risks against longer term growth potential, and the tighter price target range reflects that more cautious tone. As you read on, you will see how to follow these shifting targets and what they might mean for your own view on Nel. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...
